metadata.title: Thompson's Motif-Index of Folk-Literature — Complete Structured Database
metadata.source_edition: Revised and enlarged edition, 6 vols., Bloomington, IN: Indiana University Press, 1955-1958
metadata.csv_source: Katja Mellmann, TMI as CSV (v1.2), DOI: 10.17605/OSF.IO/XEB67, CC-BY-4.0
metadata.json_source: MOMFER / Meertens Institute (Karsdorp et al., 2015), Apache-2.0
metadata.schema_notes: Fields source_index, cultural_region, and mapped_thompson_id are included for future integration with regional motif indices (Ikeda, Klipple, Ting, etc.)

thompson_balys_integration.source: Thompson, Stith, and Jonas Balys. The Oral Tales of India. Bloomington: Indiana University Press, 1958.

version_history.description: Thompson base: 46,302 motifs from Mellmann CSV (v1.2) + MOMFER JSON
Thompson-Balys India integration: 221 new submotifs, 8,119 motifs enriched with bibliography, 9,915 with cultural regions
Kirtley Polynesia integration: 2681 new submotifs (2312 asterisk, 369 plus), 2952 motifs enriched with bibliography, 2501 with cultural regions

kirtley_integration.source: Kirtley, Bacil F. A Motif-Index of Traditional Polynesian Narratives. Honolulu: University of Hawaii Press, 1971.
kirtley_integration.digital_source: Open Access edition (1 October 2019), ScholarSpace, University of Hawaii at Manoa. EPUB: ISBN 9780824884086. PDF: ISBN 9780824884079.
kirtley_integration.license_note: Open Access edition funded by NEH/Andrew W. Mellon Foundation Humanities Open Book Program. Derivative works and commercial uses require permission from UH Press.
kirtley_integration.plus_id_scheme: Kirtley .+ entries (ambiguous placement) are assigned synthetic IDs using the pattern {base_motif_id}.901, .902, etc. to avoid collisions with Thompson numbering. The original Kirtley notation is preserved in kirtley_original_id field.

kirtley_markers.asterisk: New motif, logical extension of Thompson numbering (Kirtley convention: *)
kirtley_markers.plus: New motif, ambiguous placement in Thompson scheme (Kirtley convention: .+). Given synthetic sub-ID to avoid collision with existing Thompson motif.
kirtley_markers.none/empty: Existing Thompson motif enriched with Polynesian bibliographic references

kirtley_integration.coverage: Polynesia: Hawaii, Samoa, Tonga, Maori New Zealand, Marquesas, Cook Islands, Easter Island, Tahiti/Society Islands, Tuamotus, Mangareva, Austral Islands, Chatham Islands, and Polynesian Outliers (Tikopia, Bellona, Rennell, Ontong Java, Nukumanu, Ellice Islands, Lau Islands, Rotuma, etc.)
